uiBuilder.label: Banner
uiBuilder.description: A configurable banner / callout (info, warning, error, success) with an icon, title, up to 4 message lines, an optional link, and an optional dismiss button. Composes now-alert.

properties.name: type
properties.label: Type
properties.description: Banner severity. Sets the color and the default icon.

properties.name: title
properties.label: Title
properties.description: Bold heading shown at the top of the banner.

properties.name: line1
properties.label: Line 1
properties.description: First message line. Empty lines are skipped. Supports light markup you can type: , … for px font size, and :icon-name: for an inline icon (e.g. ':clock-outline: As of: Jan 9').
properties.defaultValue: The system has identified the following submissions as potential duplicates based on insured details, address, line of business, and exposure criteria.

properties.name: line2
properties.label: Line 2
properties.defaultValue: Review and determine whether to proceed or decline.

properties.name: icon
properties.label: Icon
properties.description: Optional now-icon glyph name. Leave empty to use the default icon for the chosen Type.

properties.name: dismissible
properties.label: Dismissible
properties.description: Show an (X) button that lets the user dismiss the banner.

properties.name: expandable
properties.label: Show more/less toggle
properties.description: When on, long banners show a 'Show more/less' toggle. Turn off to hide it and keep the full message visible.

properties.name: linkLabel
properties.label: Link label
properties.description: Optional inline link text. A link only shows when both label and URL are set.

events.name: BANNER_DISMISSED
events.description: Fired when the user dismisses the banner via the (X) button.

events.name: BANNER_LINK_CLICKED
events.description: Fired when the user clicks the inline link.
